23: # Pydantic models for type Chat Message validation
24: class Context(PydanticBaseModel):
25:     compiled: str
26:     file: str
27:     uri: Optional[str] = None
28:     query: Optional[str] = None
29: 
30:     @model_validator(mode="after")
31:     def set_uri_fallback(self):
32:         """Set the URI to existing deeplink URI. Fallback to file based URI if unset."""
33:         if self.uri and self.uri.strip():
34:             self.uri = self.uri
35:         elif self.file and (self.file.startswith("http") or self.file.startswith("file://")):
36:             self.uri = self.file
37:         elif self.file:
38:             self.uri = f"file://{self.file}"
39:         else:
40:             self.uri = None
41:         return self

303:     class InputToolOptions(models.TextChoices):

333:     is_hidden = models.BooleanField(default=False)

335:     def save(self, *args, **kwargs):
336:         is_new = self._state.adding
337: 
338:         if self.creator is None:
339:             self.managed_by_admin = True
340: 
341:         if is_new and not self.slug:
342:             random_sequence = "".join(choice("0123456789") for i in range(6))
343:             slug = f"{self.name.lower().replace(' ', '-')}-{random_sequence}"
344:             self.slug = slug
345: 
346:         super().save(*args, **kwargs)
347: 
348:     def __str__(self):
349:         return self.name

352: class ProcessLock(DbBaseModel):
353:     class Operation(models.TextChoices):
354:         INDEX_CONTENT = "index_content"
355:         SCHEDULED_JOB = "scheduled_job"
356:         SCHEDULE_LEADER = "schedule_leader"
357:         APPLY_MIGRATIONS = "apply_migrations"
358: 
359:     # We need to make sure that some operations are thread-safe. To do so, add locks for potentially shared operations.
360:     # For example, we need to make sure that only one process is updating the embeddings at a time.
361:     name = models.CharField(max_length=200, choices=Operation.choices, unique=True)
362:     started_at = models.DateTimeField(auto_now_add=True)
363:     max_duration_in_seconds = models.IntegerField(default=60 * 60 * 12)  # 12 hours
364:

366: @receiver(pre_save, sender=Agent)
367: def verify_agent(sender, instance, **kwargs):
368:     # check if this is a new instance
369:     if instance._state.adding:
370:         if Agent.objects.filter(name=instance.name, privacy_level=Agent.PrivacyLevel.PUBLIC).exists():
371:             raise ValidationError(f"A public Agent with the name {instance.name} already exists.")
372:         if Agent.objects.filter(name=instance.name, creator=instance.creator).exists():
373:             raise ValidationError(f"A private Agent with the name {instance.name} already exists.")

393: class WebScraper(DbBaseModel):
394:     class WebScraperType(models.TextChoices):
395:         FIRECRAWL = "Firecrawl"
396:         OLOSTEP = "Olostep"
397:         EXA = "Exa"
398:         DIRECT = "Direct"
399: 
400:     name = models.CharField(
401:         max_length=200,
402:         default=None,
403:         null=True,
404:         blank=True,
405:         unique=True,
406:         help_text="Friendly name. If not set, it will be set to the type of the scraper.",
407:     )
408:     type = models.CharField(max_length=20, choices=WebScraperType.choices, default=WebScraperType.DIRECT)
409:     api_key = models.CharField(
410:         max_length=200,
411:         default=None,
412:         null=True,
413:         blank=True,
414:         help_text="API key of the web scraper. Only set if scraper service requires an API key. Default is set from env var.",
415:     )
416:     api_url = models.URLField(
417:         max_length=200,
418:         default=None,
419:         null=True,
420:         blank=True,
421:         help_text="API URL of the web scraper. Only set if scraper service on non-default URL.",
422:     )
423:     priority = models.IntegerField(
424:         default=None,
425:         null=True,
426:         blank=True,
427:         unique=True,
428:         help_text="Priority of the web scraper. Lower numbers run first.",
429:     )
430: 
431:     def clean(self):
432:         error = {}
433:         if self.name is None:
434:             self.name = self.type.capitalize()
435:         if self.api_url is None:
436:             if self.type == self.WebScraperType.FIRECRAWL:
437:                 self.api_url = os.getenv("FIRECRAWL_API_URL", "https://api.firecrawl.dev")
438:             elif self.type == self.WebScraperType.OLOSTEP:
439:                 self.api_url = os.getenv("OLOSTEP_API_URL", "https://agent.olostep.com/olostep-p2p-incomingAPI")
440:             elif self.type == self.WebScraperType.EXA:
441:                 self.api_url = os.getenv("EXA_API_URL", "https://api.exa.ai")
442:         if self.api_key is None:
443:             if self.type == self.WebScraperType.FIRECRAWL:
444:                 self.api_key = os.getenv("FIRECRAWL_API_KEY")
445:                 if not self.api_key and self.api_url == "https://api.firecrawl.dev":
446:                     error["api_key"] = "Set API key to use default Firecrawl. Get API key from https://firecrawl.dev."
447:             elif self.type == self.WebScraperType.OLOSTEP:
448:                 self.api_key = os.getenv("OLOSTEP_API_KEY")
449:                 if self.api_key is None:
450:                     error["api_key"] = "Set API key to use Olostep. Get API key from https://olostep.com/."
451:             elif self.type == self.WebScraperType.EXA:
452:                 self.api_key = os.getenv("EXA_API_KEY")
453:                 if self.api_key is None:
454:                     error["api_key"] = "Set API key to use Exa. Get API key from https://exa.ai/."
455:         if error:
456:             raise ValidationError(error)
457: 
458:     def save(self, *args, **kwargs):
459:         self.clean()
460: 
461:         if self.priority is None:
462:             max_priority = WebScraper.objects.aggregate(models.Max("priority"))["priority__max"]
463:             self.priority = max_priority + 1 if max_priority else 1
464: 
465:         super().save(*args, **kwargs)
466: 
467:     def __str__(self):
468:         return self.name

554:     # This is the model name exposed to users on their settings page
555:     name = models.CharField(max_length=200, default="default")
556:     # Type of content the model can generate embeddings for
557:     model_type = models.CharField(max_length=200, choices=ModelType.choices, default=ModelType.TEXT)
558:     # Bi-encoder model of sentence-transformer type to load from HuggingFace
559:     bi_encoder = models.CharField(max_length=200, default="thenlper/gte-small")
560:     # Config passed to the sentence-transformer model constructor. E.g. device="cuda:0", trust_remote_server=True etc.
561:     bi_encoder_model_config = models.JSONField(default=dict, blank=True)
562:     # Query encode configs like prompt, precision, normalize_embeddings, etc. for sentence-transformer models
563:     bi_encoder_query_encode_config = models.JSONField(default=dict, blank=True)
564:     # Docs encode configs like prompt, precision, normalize_embeddings, etc. for sentence-transformer models
565:     bi_encoder_docs_encode_config = models.JSONField(default=dict, blank=True)
566:     # Cross-encoder model of sentence-transformer type to load from HuggingFace
567:     cross_encoder = models.CharField(max_length=200, default="mixedbread-ai/mxbai-rerank-xsmall-v1")
568:     # Config passed to the cross-encoder model constructor. E.g. device="cuda:0", trust_remote_server=True etc.
569:     cross_encoder_model_config = models.JSONField(default=dict, blank=True)
570:     # Inference server API endpoint to use for embeddings inference. Bi-encoder model should be hosted on this server
571:     embeddings_inference_endpoint = models.CharField(max_length=200, default=None, null=True, blank=True)
572:     # Inference server API Key to use for embeddings inference. Bi-encoder model should be hosted on this server
573:     embeddings_inference_endpoint_api_key = models.CharField(max_length=200, default=None, null=True, blank=True)
574:     # Inference server API type to use for embeddings inference.
575:     embeddings_inference_endpoint_type = models.CharField(
576:         max_length=200, choices=ApiType.choices, default=ApiType.LOCAL
577:     )
578:     # Inference server API endpoint to use for embeddings inference. Cross-encoder model should be hosted on this server
579:     cross_encoder_inference_endpoint = models.CharField(max_length=200, default=None, null=True, blank=True)
580:     # Inference server API Key to use for embeddings inference. Cross-encoder model should be hosted on this server
581:     cross_encoder_inference_endpoint_api_key = models.CharField(max_length=200, default=None, null=True, blank=True)
582:     # The confidence threshold of the bi_encoder model to consider the embeddings as relevant
583:     bi_encoder_confidence_threshold = models.FloatField(default=0.18)
584:     # Alpha weight for hybrid search (sparse-dense), 0 = keyword only, 1 = dense only
585:     hybrid_alpha = models.FloatField(default=0.6)
586:     # Whether to enable hybrid search combining keyword and dense retrieval
587:     hybrid_enabled = models.BooleanField(default=True)
588: 
589:     def __str__(self):
590:         return self.name

593: class TextToImageModelConfig(DbBaseModel):
594:     class ModelType(models.TextChoices):
595:         OPENAI = "openai"
596:         REPLICATE = "replicate"
597:         GOOGLE = "google"
598: 
599:     model_name = models.CharField(max_length=200, default="dall-e-3")
600:     friendly_name = models.CharField(max_length=200, default=None, null=True, blank=True)
601:     model_type = models.CharField(max_length=200, choices=ModelType.choices, default=ModelType.OPENAI)
602:     price_tier = models.CharField(max_length=20, choices=PriceTier.choices, default=PriceTier.FREE)
603:     api_key = models.CharField(max_length=200, default=None, null=True, blank=True)
604:     ai_model_api = models.ForeignKey(AiModelApi, on_delete=models.CASCADE, default=None, null=True, blank=True)
605: 
606:     def clean(self):
607:         # Custom validation logic
608:         error = {}
609:         if self.model_type == self.ModelType.OPENAI:
610:             if self.api_key and self.ai_model_api:
611:                 error["api_key"] = (
612:                     "Both API key and AI Model API cannot be set for OpenAI models. Please set only one of them."
613:                 )
614:                 error["ai_model_api"] = (
615:                     "Both API key and OpenAI config cannot be set for OpenAI models. Please set only one of them."
616:                 )
617:         if self.model_type != self.ModelType.OPENAI and self.model_type != self.ModelType.GOOGLE:
618:             if not self.api_key:
619:                 error["api_key"] = "The API key field must be set for non OpenAI, non Google models."
620:             if self.ai_model_api:
621:                 error["ai_model_api"] = "AI Model API cannot be set for non OpenAI, non Google models."
622:         if error:
623:             raise ValidationError(error)
624: 
625:     def save(self, *args, **kwargs):
626:         self.clean()
627:         super().save(*args, **kwargs)
628: 
629:     def __str__(self):
630:         return f"{self.model_name} - {self.model_type}"

663: class Conversation(DbBaseModel):
664:     user = models.ForeignKey(KhojUser, on_delete=models.CASCADE)
665:     conversation_log = models.JSONField(default=dict)
666:     client = models.ForeignKey(ClientApplication, on_delete=models.CASCADE, default=None, null=True, blank=True)
667: 
668:     # Slug is an app-generated conversation identifier. Need not be unique. Used as display title essentially.
669:     slug = models.CharField(max_length=200, default=None, null=True, blank=True)
670: 
671:     # The title field is explicitly set by the user.
672:     title = models.CharField(max_length=500, default=None, null=True, blank=True)
673:     agent = models.ForeignKey(Agent, on_delete=models.SET_NULL, default=None, null=True, blank=True)
674:     file_filters = models.JSONField(default=list)
675:     id = models.UUIDField(default=uuid.uuid4, editable=False, unique=True, primary_key=True, db_index=True)
676: 
677:     def clean(self):
678:         # Validate conversation_log structure
679:         try:
680:             messages = self.conversation_log.get("chat", [])
681:             for msg in messages:
682:                 ChatMessageModel.model_validate(msg)
683:         except Exception as e:
684:             raise ValidationError(f"Invalid conversation_log format: {str(e)}")
685: 
686:     def save(self, *args, **kwargs):
687:         self.clean()
688:         super().save(*args, **kwargs)
689: 
690:     @property
691:     def messages(self) -> List[ChatMessageModel]:
692:         """Type-hinted accessor for conversation messages"""
693:         validated_messages = []
694:         for msg in self.conversation_log.get("chat", []):
695:             try:
696:                 # Clean up inferred queries if they contain None
697:                 if msg.get("intent") and msg["intent"].get("inferred_queries"):
698:                     msg["intent"]["inferred-queries"] = [
699:                         q for q in msg["intent"]["inferred_queries"] if q is not None and isinstance(q, str)
700:                     ]
701:                 msg["message"] = str(msg.get("message", ""))
702:                 validated_messages.append(ChatMessageModel.model_validate(msg))
703:             except ValidationError as e:
704:                 logger.warning(f"Skipping invalid message in conversation: {e}")
705:                 continue
706:         return validated_messages
707: 
708:     async def pop_message(self, interrupted: bool = False) -> Optional[ChatMessageModel]:
709:         """
710:         Remove and return the last message from the conversation log, persisting the change to the database.
711:         When interrupted is True, we only drop the last message if it was an interrupted message by khoj.
712:         """
713:         chat_log = self.conversation_log.get("chat", [])
714: 
715:         if not chat_log:
716:             return None
717: 
718:         last_message = chat_log[-1]
719:         is_interrupted_msg = last_message.get("by") == "khoj" and not last_message.get("message")
720:         # When handling an interruption, only pop if the last message is an empty one by khoj.
721:         if interrupted and not is_interrupted_msg:
722:             return None
723: 
724:         # Pop the last message, save the conversation, and then return the message.
725:         popped_message_dict = chat_log.pop()
726:         await self.asave()
727: 
728:         # Try to validate and return the popped message as a Pydantic model
729:         try:
730:             return ChatMessageModel.model_validate(popped_message_dict)
731:         except ValidationError as e:
732:             logger.warning(f"Popped an invalid message from conversation. The removal has been saved. Error: {e}")
733:             # The invalid message was removed and saved, but we can't return a valid model.
734:             return None
735: 
736: 
737: class PublicConversation(DbBaseModel):
738:     source_owner = models.ForeignKey(KhojUser, on_delete=models.CASCADE)
739:     conversation_log = models.JSONField(default=dict)
740:     slug = models.CharField(max_length=200, default=None, null=True, blank=True)
741:     title = models.CharField(max_length=200, default=None, null=True, blank=True)
742:     agent = models.ForeignKey(Agent, on_delete=models.SET_NULL, default=None, null=True, blank=True)
743: 
744: 
745: @receiver(pre_save, sender=PublicConversation)
746: def verify_public_conversation(sender, instance, **kwargs):
747:     # check if this is a new instance
748:     if instance._state.adding:
749:         base_length = 50  # Base slug length before adding random suffix
750:         base_slug = re.sub(r"\W+", "-", instance.slug.lower())[:base_length] if instance.slug else uuid.uuid4().hex
751:         suffix_length = 8  # Length of the random suffix to ensure uniqueness
752:         while True:
753:             random_id = uuid.uuid4().hex[:suffix_length]
754:             slug = f"{base_slug}-{random_id}"
755:             if not PublicConversation.objects.filter(slug=slug).exists():
756:                 break
757:         instance.slug = slug
